chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.S- 659 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judges Fresh Case 1. For orders on CMA No. 4416/2022 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No. 4318/2022 (Exemption) 3. For orders on CMA No. 4319/2022 (Stay) 4. For hearing of main case 01.08.2022 Mr. Taqdir Ali Khan advocate for the petitioner -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgent application is granted. 2. Deferred. 3&4. It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioner that the petitioner is running trucks mainly to carry construction material those are being stopped by the respondents without lawful justification only to compel him to pay them bribe, therefore, they to be directed not to create hindrance in the business of the petitioner or creating harassment for him and his drivers, without due course of law. If prayer sought for by the petitioner is granted then it would amount to grant of permission in favour of the petitioner to run his business, which is within domain of the executive, such exercise therefore, could not be undertaken by this Court in exercise of its writ jurisdiction under the garb of harassment. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine accordingly. JUDGE
